---
title: "Edith Harriet Durst, Mrs"
---

## Edith Harriet Durst, Mrs

**Dates:** (1842-1922)

**Maiden name:** Gibson

### Description

Wife  (married 1871) of the Rev. Canon William Durst (1838-1922), later Rector of St. Mary, Southampton.  Her mother Louisianna was a daughter of the Rt. Rev. Charles Sumner, Bishop of Winchester.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
